appraisal_events.evidence: « Mme Verdurin et son mari avaient contracté… des instincts cruels… Saniette leur offrait un souffre-douleur quotidien… on avait soin de l'inviter… afin de… lui faire des brimades quand il ne pourra plus s'échapper. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator exposes the Verdurins’ deliberate cruelty and manipulative inclusion of Saniette as a daily scapegoat, which locally lowers the Patron’s standing.

status_effects.explanation: His calculated use of Saniette as a victim and policing of others’ emotions mark him as cruel and controlling in this scene.
